requirement_topic.en: Restricted Substances — No EU-Style Horizontal RoHS in Mozambique (vs CN GB/T 26572)
requirement_topic.zh: 限用物质——莫桑比克无欧盟式横向 RoHS（vs 中国 GB/T 26572）
requirement_topic.zht: 限用物質——莫三比克無歐盟式橫向 RoHS（vs 中國 GB/T 26572）

summary.en: Mozambique does NOT operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS regime that restricts hazardous substances in electrical and electronic equipment (EEE) as a precondition for market placement. There is no Mozambique counterpart to EU Directive 2011/65/EU (RoHS 2) restricting 10 substances in homogeneous materials, and no national obligation requiring substance testing (lead, mercury, cadmium, hexavalent chromium, PBB, PBDE, or the four phthalates DEHP/BBP/DBP/DIBP) as a horizontal market-access gate. The applicable Mozambique import controls for LED luminaires centre on SAFETY conformity through INNOQ (NM/IEC 60598-1, IEC 62560), correct Portuguese-language marking, and an in-country importer. General product-safety and consumer-protection expectations may still apply, and individual procurement contracts or buyers may impose their own restricted-substances clauses voluntarily; the exporter should confirm any such buyer-driven requirement directly. This row states plainly that there is no horizontal RoHS regulation to satisfy in Mozambique as of the access date.
summary.zh: 莫桑比克不实行将电气电子设备（EEE）有害物质限制作为上市先决条件的欧盟式横向 RoHS 制度。无对应欧盟指令 2011/65/EU（RoHS 2）限制均质材料中 10 项物质的制度，亦无要求将物质检测（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE，或四项邻苯二甲酸酯 DEHP/BBP/DBP/DIBP）作为横向市场准入关口的国家义务。莫桑比克对 LED 灯具的进口管控以通过 INNOQ 的安全合规（NM/IEC 60598-1、IEC 62560）、正确的葡萄牙语标识及在地进口商为核心。一般产品安全和消费者保护预期仍可能适用，个别采购合同或买家也可能自愿施加其自身的限用物质条款；出口商应直接确认任何此类由买家驱动的要求。本行明确说明：截至访问日期，莫桑比克无须满足的横向 RoHS 法规。
summary.zht: 莫三比克不實行將電氣電子設備（EEE）有害物質限制作為上市先決條件的歐盟式橫向 RoHS 制度。無對應歐盟指令 2011/65/EU（RoHS 2）限制均質材料中 10 項物質的制度，亦無要求將物質檢測（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE，或四項鄰苯二甲酸酯 DEHP/BBP/DBP/DIBP）作為橫向市場准入關口的國家義務。莫三比克對 LED 燈具的進口管控以通過 INNOQ 的安全合規（NM/IEC 60598-1、IEC 62560）、正確的葡萄牙語標識及在地進口商為核心。一般產品安全和消費者保護預期仍可能適用，個別採購合同或買家也可能自願施加其自身的限用物質條款；出口商應直接確認任何此類由買家驅動的要求。本行明確說明：截至訪問日期，莫三比克無須滿足的橫向 RoHS 法規。

standards_or_laws: No Mozambique horizontal RoHS regulation equivalent to EU Directive 2011/65/EU (RoHS 2) as of the access date
INNOQ safety conformity (NM/IEC 60598-1, IEC 62560) + Portuguese-language marking — the applicable import-stage controls

summary.en: China's restricted-substances framework is GB/T 26572-2011 (Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE), covering the original 6 RoHS substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE) at the same thresholds as EU RoHS, together with China RoHS 2 (SJ/T 11364-2014) which requires a hazardous-substance disclosure label (orange = contains above threshold / green = below threshold) on EEE sold in China. As of 2026, the 4 phthalates added by EU Directive 2015/863 are not yet in the CN mandatory restricted list. China's regime is primarily a DISCLOSURE/marking regime rather than an EU-style market-access restriction.
summary.zh: 中国限用物质框架为 GB/T 26572-2011（电子电气产品中限用物质的限量要求），涵盖原 6 项 RoHS 物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE），限值与欧盟 RoHS 相同，并配合中国 RoHS 2（SJ/T 11364-2014），要求在中国销售的 EEE 上贴附有害物质披露标识（橙色=含量超限/绿色=低于限值）。截至 2026 年，欧盟指令 2015/863 新增的 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯尚未纳入中国强制限制清单。中国制度主要为披露/标识制度，而非欧盟式市场准入限制。
summary.zht: 中國限用物質框架為 GB/T 26572-2011（電子電氣產品中限用物質的限量要求），涵蓋原 6 項 RoHS 物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE），限值與歐盟 RoHS 相同，並配合中國 RoHS 2（SJ/T 11364-2014），要求在中國銷售的 EEE 上貼附有害物質披露標識（橙色=含量超限/綠色=低於限值）。截至 2026 年，歐盟指令 2015/863 新增的 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯尚未納入中國強制限制清單。中國制度主要為披露/標識制度，而非歐盟式市場准入限制。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572-2011 — Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE (SAC/SAMR — covers original 6 substances)
SJ/T 11364-2014 — Marking for the restricted use of hazardous substances in electronic and electrical products (China RoHS 2 disclosure label)

gap.en: The direction of the gap is the OPPOSITE of the China-to-EU case. For the EU, the key gap was the 4 added phthalates a CN product had not been tested for. For Mozambique, there is no horizontal RoHS at all, so a Chinese exporter faces NO new mandatory restricted-substances testing as a Mozambique market-access condition. Practical implications: (1) the Chinese hazardous-substance disclosure label (SJ/T 11364) is in Chinese and is not a Mozambique requirement — it can be omitted or, where retained on packaging, supplemented with Portuguese information; (2) do not over-engineer RoHS compliance for Mozambique on the assumption an EU-style regime exists — it does not; (3) BUT individual buyers, tenders, or international brand owners may contractually require RoHS-style or REACH-style declarations, and some products re-exported onward may later enter RoHS jurisdictions — so an exporter already holding RoHS test data should keep it available as a commercial asset even though Mozambique law does not compel it. Confirm any buyer-specific substance clause directly with the importer/customer.
gap.zh: 差距方向与中国对欧盟情形相反。对欧盟而言，关键差距是中国产品未检测的 4 项新增邻苯二甲酸酯。对莫桑比克而言，完全无横向 RoHS，因此中国出口商作为莫桑比克市场准入条件不面临任何新增强制限用物质检测。实务含义：（1）中国有害物质披露标识（SJ/T 11364）为中文且非莫桑比克要求——可省略，或在包装上保留时补充葡萄牙语信息；（2）不要在假定存在欧盟式制度的前提下为莫桑比克过度设计 RoHS 合规——并不存在；（3）但个别买家、招标或国际品牌商可能合同性要求 RoHS 式或 REACH 式声明，且部分转口产品日后可能进入 RoHS 法域——因此已持有 RoHS 检测数据的出口商应将其作为商业资产保留备用，尽管莫桑比克法律不强制。请就任何买家特定物质条款直接与进口商/客户确认。
gap.zht: 差距方向與中國對歐盟情形相反。對歐盟而言，關鍵差距是中國產品未檢測的 4 項新增鄰苯二甲酸酯。對莫三比克而言，完全無橫向 RoHS，因此中國出口商作為莫三比克市場准入條件不面臨任何新增強制限用物質檢測。實務含義：（1）中國有害物質披露標識（SJ/T 11364）為中文且非莫三比克要求——可省略，或在包裝上保留時補充葡萄牙語信息；（2）不要在假定存在歐盟式制度的前提下為莫三比克過度設計 RoHS 合規——並不存在；（3）但個別買家、招標或國際品牌商可能合同性要求 RoHS 式或 REACH 式聲明，且部分轉口產品日後可能進入 RoHS 法域——因此已持有 RoHS 檢測數據的出口商應將其作為商業資產保留備用，儘管莫三比克法律不強制。請就任何買家特定物質條款直接與進口商/客戶確認。

mandatory_status.target: Not required — no EU-style horizontal RoHS regime in Mozambique as of the access date; no mandatory restricted-substances testing as a market-access condition. Buyer/tender contracts may impose voluntary substance clauses — confirm directly.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (disclosure) — China RoHS 2 hazardous-substance disclosure label required; GB/T 26572 covers 6 original substances; 4 phthalates not yet in CN mandatory list as of 2026

source.publisher: INNOQ — Instituto Nacional de Normalizacao e Qualidade (Mozambique)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mozambique operates no EU-style horizontal RoHS regime, so there is no mandatory restricted-substances testing as a market-access condition — the direction of this gap is the opposite of China-to-EU. The applicable controls are INNOQ safety conformity and Portuguese-language marking. The Chinese SJ/T 11364 disclosure label is not a Mozambique requirement. Exporters should not over-engineer RoHS compliance for Mozambique, but should keep any existing RoHS data available because individual buyers, tenders, or onward re-export markets may demand it contractually. Confirm any buyer-specific substance clause directly with the importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 莫桑比克不实行欧盟式横向 RoHS 制度，因此无作为市场准入条件的强制限用物质检测——此差距方向与中国对欧盟相反。适用管控为 INNOQ 安全合规及葡萄牙语标识。中国 SJ/T 11364 披露标识非莫桑比克要求。出口商不应为莫桑比克过度设计 RoHS 合规，但应保留任何现有 RoHS 数据备用，因个别买家、招标或转口市场可能合同性要求。请就任何买家特定物质条款直接与进口商确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 莫三比克不實行歐盟式橫向 RoHS 制度，因此無作為市場准入條件的強制限用物質檢測——此差距方向與中國對歐盟相反。適用管控為 INNOQ 安全合規及葡萄牙語標識。中國 SJ/T 11364 披露標識非莫三比克要求。出口商不應為莫三比克過度設計 RoHS 合規，但應保留任何現有 RoHS 數據備用，因個別買家、招標或轉口市場可能合同性要求。請就任何買家特定物質條款直接與進口商確認。

requirement_topic.en: Chemical / SVHC Notification — No REACH-Style Regime in Mozambique (vs CN Chemical Rules)
requirement_topic.zh: 化学品 / SVHC 通报——莫桑比克无 REACH 式制度（vs 中国化学品法规）
requirement_topic.zht: 化學品 / SVHC 通報——莫三比克無 REACH 式制度（vs 中國化學品法規）

summary.en: Mozambique has NO REACH-style chemical regime and no equivalent to the EU REACH Article 33 obligation to notify business customers or consumers about Substances of Very High Concern (SVHC) present in an article above 0.1% w/w, nor an ECHA-style Candidate List, nor a SCIP-style database. There is therefore no ongoing supply-chain SVHC-screening compliance obligation tied to a national candidate list for LED luminaires entering Mozambique. The applicable Mozambique controls remain INNOQ safety conformity and Portuguese-language marking. Mozambique participates in general international chemicals frameworks (e.g. as a party to relevant multilateral environmental agreements), but these do not create an article-level B2B SVHC-notification duty equivalent to REACH Article 33. Exporters should confirm with the in-country importer whether any specific hazardous-material restriction applies to the product, and treat any REACH-style data they hold as a commercial asset rather than a Mozambique legal requirement.
summary.zh: 莫桑比克无 REACH 式化学品制度，无对应欧盟 REACH 第 33 条就物品中浓度超过 0.1%（质量分数）的高度关注物质（SVHC）通报商业客户或消费者的义务，无 ECHA 式候选清单，亦无 SCIP 式数据库。因此，对进入莫桑比克的 LED 灯具，不存在与国家候选清单挂钩的持续供应链 SVHC 筛查合规义务。适用的莫桑比克管控仍为 INNOQ 安全合规及葡萄牙语标识。莫桑比克参与一般国际化学品框架（如作为相关多边环境协定缔约方），但这些不产生与 REACH 第 33 条等效的物品级 B2B SVHC 通报义务。出口商应与在地进口商确认是否对该产品适用任何特定有害物质限制，并将其持有的任何 REACH 式数据视为商业资产而非莫桑比克法律要求。
summary.zht: 莫三比克無 REACH 式化學品制度，無對應歐盟 REACH 第 33 條就物品中濃度超過 0.1%（質量分數）的高度關注物質（SVHC）通報商業客戶或消費者的義務，無 ECHA 式候選清單，亦無 SCIP 式數據庫。因此，對進入莫三比克的 LED 燈具，不存在與國家候選清單掛鈎的持續供應鏈 SVHC 篩查合規義務。適用的莫三比克管控仍為 INNOQ 安全合規及葡萄牙語標識。莫三比克參與一般國際化學品框架（如作為相關多邊環境協定締約方），但這些不產生與 REACH 第 33 條等效的物品級 B2B SVHC 通報義務。出口商應與在地進口商確認是否對該產品適用任何特定有害物質限制，並將其持有的任何 REACH 式數據視為商業資產而非莫三比克法律要求。

standards_or_laws: No Mozambique equivalent to EU REACH Regulation (EC) 1907/2006 Article 33 SVHC supply-chain notification, ECHA Candidate List, or SCIP database as of the access date
INNOQ safety conformity + Portuguese-language marking — the applicable import-stage controls

summary.en: China has no direct equivalent to the REACH SVHC Article 33 supply-chain notification obligation either. The closest CN instruments are the Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances (MEE Order No. 12, 2020) on new-substance registration and GB 30981-2020 (Rules for the classification and labelling of chemicals) for hazardous-chemical labelling. None of these create an article-level duty to proactively notify B2B customers when an SVHC exceeds 0.1% w/w in an article. In this respect China and Mozambique are similar: neither imposes a REACH Article 33-style article-level notification duty.
summary.zh: 中国同样没有直接对应 REACH SVHC 第 33 条供应链通报义务的制度。最接近的中国工具为《新化学物质环境管理登记办法》（生态环境部令第 12 号，2020 年）关于新物质登记及 GB 30981-2020（化学品分类和标签规则）用于危险化学品标签。上述均未产生在物品中 SVHC 超过 0.1%（质量分数）时主动通报 B2B 客户的物品级义务。在这一点上中国与莫桑比克相似：两者均不施加 REACH 第 33 条式物品级通报义务。
summary.zht: 中國同樣沒有直接對應 REACH SVHC 第 33 條供應鏈通報義務的制度。最接近的中國工具為《新化學物質環境管理登記辦法》（生態環境部令第 12 號，2020 年）關於新物質登記及 GB 30981-2020（化學品分類和標籤規則）用於危險化學品標籤。上述均未產生在物品中 SVHC 超過 0.1%（質量分數）時主動通報 B2B 客戶的物品級義務。在這一點上中國與莫三比克相似：兩者均不施加 REACH 第 33 條式物品級通報義務。

standards_or_laws: MEE Order No. 12 (2020) — Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances (China)
GB 30981-2020 — Rules for the classification and labelling of chemicals (China)

gap.en: Both China and Mozambique lack a REACH Article 33-style article-level SVHC notification duty, so for a Chinese exporter there is NO new SVHC supply-chain notification obligation created by entering Mozambique — this contrasts sharply with the China-to-EU case where REACH Article 33 / SCIP was a significant ongoing burden. Practical points: (1) do not build a biannual ECHA-Candidate-List screening process for Mozambique purposes — there is no Mozambique candidate list to track; (2) the firm Mozambique obligations remain safety conformity and Portuguese marking; (3) however, if the product is sold to a multinational buyer or destined for onward re-export into the EU or another REACH jurisdiction, REACH obligations may still attach downstream — so an exporter with an established SVHC-screening capability retains a commercial advantage. Confirm directly with the buyer/importer whether any contractual chemical-declaration is required.
gap.zh: 中国与莫桑比克均缺乏 REACH 第 33 条式物品级 SVHC 通报义务，因此对中国出口商而言，进入莫桑比克不产生任何新增 SVHC 供应链通报义务——这与中国对欧盟情形（REACH 第 33 条 / SCIP 是重大持续负担）形成鲜明对比。实务要点：（1）不要为莫桑比克目的建立每半年 ECHA 候选清单筛查流程——无莫桑比克候选清单可跟踪；（2）确定的莫桑比克义务仍为安全合规及葡萄牙语标识；（3）但若产品销售给跨国买家或拟转口至欧盟或其他 REACH 法域，REACH 义务仍可能在下游附加——因此具备成熟 SVHC 筛查能力的出口商保留商业优势。请直接与买家/进口商确认是否要求任何合同性化学品声明。
gap.zht: 中國與莫三比克均缺乏 REACH 第 33 條式物品級 SVHC 通報義務，因此對中國出口商而言，進入莫三比克不產生任何新增 SVHC 供應鏈通報義務——這與中國對歐盟情形（REACH 第 33 條 / SCIP 是重大持續負擔）形成鮮明對比。實務要點：（1）不要為莫三比克目的建立每半年 ECHA 候選清單篩查流程——無莫三比克候選清單可跟蹤；（2）確定的莫三比克義務仍為安全合規及葡萄牙語標識；（3）但若產品銷售給跨國買家或擬轉口至歐盟或其他 REACH 法域，REACH 義務仍可能在下游附加——因此具備成熟 SVHC 篩查能力的出口商保留商業優勢。請直接與買家/進口商確認是否要求任何合同性化學品聲明。

mandatory_status.target: Not required — no REACH-style SVHC supply-chain notification, candidate list, or SCIP-equivalent in Mozambique as of the access date. Downstream/buyer obligations may still apply if re-exported to a REACH jurisdiction — confirm directly.
mandatory_status.cn: No direct equivalent — China has no REACH Article 33-style article-level SVHC notification duty

source.publisher: INNOQ — Instituto Nacional de Normalizacao e Qualidade (Mozambique)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mozambique has no REACH-style chemical regime, no SVHC candidate list, and no Article 33-style article-level notification duty — and in this respect aligns with China, which also lacks one. So entering Mozambique creates no new SVHC supply-chain obligation, unlike the China-to-EU case. The firm Mozambique controls remain INNOQ safety conformity and Portuguese-language marking. Exporters should not build a Mozambique-specific SVHC-screening process, but should retain any existing capability because downstream multinational buyers or onward re-export into a REACH jurisdiction may still require it. Confirm any contractual chemical declaration directly with the buyer/importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 莫桑比克无 REACH 式化学品制度、无 SVHC 候选清单、无第 33 条式物品级通报义务——在这一点上与同样缺乏该制度的中国一致。因此进入莫桑比克不产生新增 SVHC 供应链义务，与中国对欧盟情形不同。确定的莫桑比克管控仍为 INNOQ 安全合规及葡萄牙语标识。出口商不应建立莫桑比克特定 SVHC 筛查流程，但应保留任何现有能力，因下游跨国买家或转口至 REACH 法域仍可能要求。请直接与买家/进口商确认任何合同性化学品声明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 莫三比克無 REACH 式化學品制度、無 SVHC 候選清單、無第 33 條式物品級通報義務——在這一點上與同樣缺乏該制度的中國一致。因此進入莫三比克不產生新增 SVHC 供應鏈義務，與中國對歐盟情形不同。確定的莫三比克管控仍為 INNOQ 安全合規及葡萄牙語標識。出口商不應建立莫三比克特定 SVHC 篩查流程，但應保留任何現有能力，因下游跨國買家或轉口至 REACH 法域仍可能要求。請直接與買家/進口商確認任何合同性化學品聲明。

requirement_topic.en: Conformity Process and Documentation — INNOQ Conformity vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zh: 合格评定流程与文件——INNOQ 合规 vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zht: 合格評定流程與文件——INNOQ 合規 vs CCC / CQC

summary.en: For Mozambique market access, an LED luminaire exporter should expect: (1) INNOQ-administered conformity for regulated electrical products, built on NM (Norma Mocambicana) standards that adopt IEC (NM/IEC 60598-1 luminaire safety, IEC 62560 self-ballasted lamps, IEC 61347-2-13 LED control gear, CISPR 15 / IEC 61547 EMC, IEC 62471 photobiological); (2) IEC-based test evidence — an IECEE CB Scheme test report with the relevant national differences is the practical international bridge, because Mozambique adopts IEC standards; (3) conformity/import inspection for regulated products, which may include pre-shipment inspection or import verification routed through INNOQ and customs; (4) Portuguese-language product documentation, instructions, markings, and a Declaration that the product meets the applicable NM/IEC standards; (5) an in-country importer of record to handle customs clearance through Maputo, Beira, or Nacala and to interface with INNOQ/INCM; (6) INCM type-approval separately for any wireless-enabled luminaire. There is no published EU-style CE self-declaration mark; conformity is demonstrated through the INNOQ/import-inspection route as confirmed by the importer.
summary.zh: 对于莫桑比克市场准入，LED 灯具出口商应预期：（1）由 INNOQ 管理的受管制电气产品合规，建立在采纳 IEC 的 NM（莫桑比克标准）之上（NM/IEC 60598-1 灯具安全、IEC 62560 自镇流灯、IEC 61347-2-13 LED 控制装置、CISPR 15 / IEC 61547 电磁兼容、IEC 62471 光生物）；（2）基于 IEC 的检测证据——含相关国家差异的 IECEE CB 体系检测报告是实际国际桥梁，因莫桑比克采纳 IEC 标准；（3）受管制产品的合规/进口检验，可能包括经 INNOQ 和海关的装运前检验或进口核验；（4）葡萄牙语产品文件、说明书、标识，以及产品符合适用 NM/IEC 标准的声明；（5）在地进口记录商，处理通过马普托、贝拉或纳卡拉的清关并对接 INNOQ/INCM；（6）任何具备无线功能的灯具须单独取得 INCM 型号核准。无公布的欧盟式 CE 自我声明标志；合规通过 INNOQ/进口检验路径证明，并由进口商确认。
summary.zht: 對於莫三比克市場准入，LED 燈具出口商應預期：（1）由 INNOQ 管理的受管制電氣產品合規，建立在採納 IEC 的 NM（莫三比克標準）之上（NM/IEC 60598-1 燈具安全、IEC 62560 自鎮流燈、IEC 61347-2-13 LED 控制裝置、CISPR 15 / IEC 61547 電磁兼容、IEC 62471 光生物）；（2）基於 IEC 的檢測證據——含相關國家差異的 IECEE CB 體系檢測報告是實際國際橋樑，因莫三比克採納 IEC 標準；（3）受管制產品的合規/進口檢驗，可能包括經 INNOQ 和海關的裝運前檢驗或進口核驗；（4）葡萄牙語產品文件、說明書、標識，以及產品符合適用 NM/IEC 標準的聲明；（5）在地進口記錄商，處理通過馬普托、貝拉或納卡拉的清關並對接 INNOQ/INCM；（6）任何具備無線功能的燈具須單獨取得 INCM 型號核准。無公佈的歐盟式 CE 自我聲明標誌；合規通過 INNOQ/進口檢驗路徑證明，並由進口商確認。

standards_or_laws: INNOQ — Instituto Nacional de Normalizacao e Qualidade: conformity / import inspection for regulated electrical products against NM/IEC standards
IECEE CB Scheme test report (IEC 60598-1 / IEC 62560 / IEC 61347-2-13 / CISPR 15 / IEC 61547 / IEC 62471) — practical international bridge
INCM (Instituto Nacional das Comunicacoes de Mocambique) — radio type-approval for wireless-enabled luminaires
Portuguese-language documentation, instructions, and markings; in-country importer of record

summary.en: In China the primary mandatory certification for luminaires sold in the residential market is CCC (China Compulsory Certification), administered by CNCA (Certification and Accreditation Administration of China) and certified by CNCA-authorised bodies such as CQC (China Quality Certification Centre). Voluntary CQC certification is available for products outside mandatory CCC scope. For wireless-enabled luminaires, SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) type approval is additionally required in China. CCC certification bodies and CCC/GB test reports are not automatically recognised for Mozambique INNOQ conformity, although the shared IEC technical base means much of the underlying test evidence is reusable when re-issued in IECEE CB / IEC form.
summary.zh: 在中国，面向居民市场销售灯具的主要强制认证为中国强制性产品认证（CCC），由中国国家认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）管理，并由 CNCA 授权机构（如中国质量认证中心 CQC）认证。对于非强制 CCC 范畴产品，可申请自愿性 CQC 认证。对于具备无线功能的灯具，在中国还须取得国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC）型号核准。CCC 认证机构及 CCC/GB 检测报告不自动获莫桑比克 INNOQ 合规认可，但共同的 IEC 技术基础意味着以 IECEE CB / IEC 形式重新出具时，大部分底层检测证据可复用。
summary.zht: 在中國，面向居民市場銷售燈具的主要強制認證為中國強制性產品認證（CCC），由中國國家認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）管理，並由 CNCA 授權機構（如中國質量認證中心 CQC）認證。對於非強制 CCC 範疇產品，可申請自願性 CQC 認證。對於具備無線功能的燈具，在中國還須取得國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC）型號核准。CCC 認證機構及 CCC/GB 檢測報告不自動獲莫三比克 INNOQ 合規認可，但共同的 IEC 技術基礎意味著以 IECEE CB / IEC 形式重新出具時，大部分底層檢測證據可復用。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires (CNCA/CQC)
SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China

gap.en: The CCC and INNOQ processes are parallel and non-mutual — a CCC certificate does not grant Mozambique access. Key Mozambique-specific points relative to the CN-domestic process: (1) the technical bridge is IEC, not GB — an IECEE CB test report is far more useful for Mozambique than a CCC certificate, so an exporter should obtain CB reports covering IEC 60598-1 / 62560 / 61347-2-13 / CISPR 15 / IEC 62471; (2) Portuguese-language documentation and markings are required, replacing Chinese-language CCC artwork; (3) an in-country importer of record is needed to clear customs (Maputo/Beira/Nacala) and interface with INNOQ — this is the Mozambique analogue of needing local representation, comparable in function to the EU Authorised Representative role though grounded in import/conformity rather than CE law; (4) wireless luminaires require INCM type-approval (the Mozambique analogue of China's SRRC); (5) confirm the current INNOQ regulated-product list and import-inspection procedure with the importer, since scope and pre-shipment-inspection requirements can change. Relative to the EU, the documentation burden is lighter (no horizontal RoHS, no REACH, no EPREL, no mandatory blue-light label) but the IEC test evidence, Portuguese localisation, and import-of-record requirements are firm.
gap.zh: CCC 与 INNOQ 流程并行且不互认——CCC 证书不授予莫桑比克准入。相对于中国境内流程的莫桑比克特有要点：（1）技术桥梁是 IEC 而非 GB——IECEE CB 检测报告对莫桑比克远比 CCC 证书有用，因此出口商应取得涵盖 IEC 60598-1 / 62560 / 61347-2-13 / CISPR 15 / IEC 62471 的 CB 报告；（2）须以葡萄牙语文件和标识取代中文 CCC 设计；（3）须有在地进口记录商清关（马普托/贝拉/纳卡拉）并对接 INNOQ——这是莫桑比克对应的当地代表需求，功能上与欧盟授权代表角色相当，但基于进口/合规而非 CE 法；（4）无线灯具须取得 INCM 型号核准（莫桑比克对应中国 SRRC）；（5）由于范围和装运前检验要求可能变化，请与进口商确认现行 INNOQ 受管制产品清单及进口检验程序。相对于欧盟，文件负担更轻（无横向 RoHS、无 REACH、无 EPREL、无强制蓝光标签），但 IEC 检测证据、葡萄牙语本地化及进口记录商要求是确定的。
gap.zht: CCC 與 INNOQ 流程並行且不互認——CCC 證書不授予莫三比克准入。相對於中國境內流程的莫三比克特有要點：（1）技術橋樑是 IEC 而非 GB——IECEE CB 檢測報告對莫三比克遠比 CCC 證書有用，因此出口商應取得涵蓋 IEC 60598-1 / 62560 / 61347-2-13 / CISPR 15 / IEC 62471 的 CB 報告；（2）須以葡萄牙語文件和標識取代中文 CCC 設計；（3）須有在地進口記錄商清關（馬普托/貝拉/納卡拉）並對接 INNOQ——這是莫三比克對應的當地代表需求，功能上與歐盟授權代表角色相當，但基於進口/合規而非 CE 法；（4）無線燈具須取得 INCM 型號核准（莫三比克對應中國 SRRC）；（5）由於範圍和裝運前檢驗要求可能變化，請與進口商確認現行 INNOQ 受管制產品清單及進口檢驗程序。相對於歐盟，文件負擔更輕（無橫向 RoHS、無 REACH、無 EPREL、無強制藍光標籤），但 IEC 檢測證據、葡萄牙語本地化及進口記錄商要求是確定的。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (regulated products) — INNOQ conformity / import inspection against NM/IEC standards required for regulated electrical products; Portuguese-language documentation and in-country importer required; INCM type-approval for wireless luminaires. Confirm current regulated-product scope with the importer.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for residential luminaires under CNCA-C10-01; SRRC type approval additionally required for wireless-enabled luminaires

source.publisher: INNOQ — Instituto Nacional de Normalizacao e Qualidade (Mozambique)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mozambique market access for LED luminaires runs through INNOQ conformity / import inspection against NM/IEC standards, not an EU-style CE self-declaration and not Chinese CCC. CCC and INNOQ are parallel and non-mutual, but the shared IEC base makes an IECEE CB test report the practical bridge. Firm Mozambique requirements: IEC-based test evidence, Portuguese-language documentation and markings, an in-country importer of record (Maputo/Beira/Nacala), and INCM type-approval for wireless luminaires. The burden is lighter than the EU (no horizontal RoHS, REACH, EPREL, or mandatory blue-light label) but heavier on IEC evidence and Portuguese localisation. Confirm current regulated-product scope and import-inspection procedure with the importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] LED 灯具的莫桑比克市场准入通过对照 NM/IEC 标准的 INNOQ 合规/进口检验，而非欧盟式 CE 自我声明，也非中国 CCC。CCC 与 INNOQ 并行且不互认，但共同的 IEC 基础使 IECEE CB 检测报告成为实际桥梁。确定的莫桑比克要求：基于 IEC 的检测证据、葡萄牙语文件和标识、在地进口记录商（马普托/贝拉/纳卡拉），以及无线灯具的 INCM 型号核准。负担轻于欧盟（无横向 RoHS、REACH、EPREL 或强制蓝光标签），但在 IEC 证据和葡萄牙语本地化方面更重。请与进口商确认现行受管制产品范围及进口检验程序。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] LED 燈具的莫三比克市場准入通過對照 NM/IEC 標準的 INNOQ 合規/進口檢驗，而非歐盟式 CE 自我聲明，也非中國 CCC。CCC 與 INNOQ 並行且不互認，但共同的 IEC 基礎使 IECEE CB 檢測報告成為實際橋樑。確定的莫三比克要求：基於 IEC 的檢測證據、葡萄牙語文件和標識、在地進口記錄商（馬普托/貝拉/納卡拉），以及無線燈具的 INCM 型號核准。負擔輕於歐盟（無橫向 RoHS、REACH、EPREL 或強制藍光標籤），但在 IEC 證據和葡萄牙語本地化方面更重。請與進口商確認現行受管制產品範圍及進口檢驗程序。
